title: platanthera dilatata subsp. convallariifolia
intro: Platanthera dilatata subsp. convallariifolia, also known as the green orchid or convallaria-leaved green orchid, is a rare subspecies of the Platanthera dilatata orchid native to the mountainous regions of East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Platanthera dilatata subsp. convallariifolia include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and processed into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
